notes: Probe battery for AI subject-identification probing. Each probe runs in a SEPARATE session/conversation per image per model. Probe C questions are asked individually and sequentially within one session, never as a list. Probe A is a logged covariate, not scored. Probe B-enriched runs only after B-plain, in a separate session. global_system_instruction is sent as the system message of every session.
global_system_instruction: You are looking at a single image. Answer only from what is visible in the image and your own internal knowledge. Do not use web search, retrieval, external tools, or any internet resources to answer.

mythology: Aeneas rescues his father Anchises from the burning Troy
The wedding of Peleus and Thetis
The Competition of Apollo and Pan and the judgment of Midas
Apollo in Vulcan's forge revealing Venus' love-affair with Mars
The Triumph of Mars: an Allegory of War
The meeting of Nausicaa and Ulysses
The meeting of Dido and Aeneas
The goddess Pallas Athena and the horse Pegasus
Sacrifice to Venus in a temple
old_testament: The finding of Moses: Pharaoh's daughter discovers the child floating on the river
The sacrifice of Isaac (Abraham and Isaac)
Potiphar's wife catches Joseph by his robe; Joseph escapes
Balaam strikes his ass; the ass lies down and starts to speak
Isaac blesses Jacob disguised in Esau's clothes
Samson breaks the pillars; the temple of Dagon collapses
Bathsheba receives a letter from David
Hagar, Ishmael and the Angel in the Wilderness
The Prodigal Son chased from the brothel (Luke 15:13)
Judah's love-affair with Tamar; he gives her his signet-ring and staff

A_recognition.role: recognition probe — structured JSON; scored per element (artist/title/date/collection) by score_probe_a.py via LLM-judge against institutional ground truth (data/metadata.json). Also flags potential training-data contamination and helps interpret B results.
A_recognition.prompt: What artwork is this? Answer with a SINGLE JSON object and nothing else (no markdown fences), with these keys: "recognized" (true or false — do you recognise this specific work), "artist", "title", "date", "collection". Give your best value for each field as a string, or null if unknown. Answer only from the image and your own knowledge.

B_plain.role: core task — open subject identification, no context
B_plain.prompt: What is depicted in this image?

B_framed.role: open identification with cultural framing — separate session
B_framed.prompt: This is a European oil painting. What scene or subject is depicted? Name the episode and the figures if you can.

B_forced_choice_mythology.role: closed identification from mythology list — separate session; contrast with B_plain isolates open-ended retrieval as the bottleneck
B_forced_choice_mythology.prompt:
This painting depicts one of the following subjects. Which one is it?
— Prometheus chained by Vulcan
— Aeneas rescues his father Anchises from the burning Troy
— Abduction of Amphitrite by Poseidon
— The wedding of Peleus and Thetis
— The Competition of Apollo and Pan and the judgment of Midas
— Marriage of Cupid and Psyche
— The Triumph of Bacchus
— Apollo in Vulcan's forge revealing Venus' love-affair with Mars
— The Triumph of Mars: an Allegory of War
— The meeting of Nausicaa and Ulysses
— The meeting of Dido and Aeneas
— The sacrifice of Iphigenia
— The goddess Pallas Athena and the horse Pegasus
— Dido's sacrifice to Juno
— Sacrifice to Venus in a temple
Answer with the subject only.

B_forced_choice_old_testament.role: closed identification from Old Testament list — separate session
B_forced_choice_old_testament.prompt:
This painting depicts one of the following subjects. Which one is it?
— The finding of Moses: Pharaoh's daughter discovers the child floating on the river
— The sacrifice of Isaac (Abraham and Isaac)
— Potiphar's wife catches Joseph by his robe; Joseph escapes
— Balaam strikes his ass; the ass lies down and starts to speak
— Isaac blesses Jacob disguised in Esau's clothes
— Samson breaks the pillars; the temple of Dagon collapses
— The drunkenness of Noah
— Feast of Esther
— Belshazzar's Feast
— Bathsheba receives a letter from David
— The Gathering of Manna
— Hagar, Ishmael and the Angel in the Wilderness
— The Prodigal Son chased from the brothel (Luke 15:13)
— Jephtha welcomed by his daughter (Judges 11:29-40)
— Judah's love-affair with Tamar; he gives her his signet-ring and staff
Answer with the subject only.

B_enriched.role: intervention test — run only after B_plain, in a separate session; B_plain vs B_enriched difference estimates how much knowledge access matters vs visual pattern matching
B_enriched.subject_descriptions_status: INCOMPLETE — one-sentence visual description required for all subjects before running; mythology has 3/15, old_testament has 0/15

subject_descriptions.Aeneas rescues his father Anchises from: a young man carries an elderly man on his back while escaping a burning city, accompanied by a small boy and other family members fleeing.
subject_descriptions.The sacrifice of Iphigenia: a young woman is led to an altar by priests while her father Agamemnon looks away in grief; often a deer appears as a divine substitution.
subject_descriptions.The meeting of Dido and Aeneas: a queen receives a traveller in a regal setting, with attendants; a harbour or ships may be visible.

probe_C_checklists._notes: Closed verification questions per image. Ask individually and sequentially in one session. Expert-scored (semantic match), not exact-match. Lock the checklist with the domain expert BEFORE running.

aeneas-anchises-troy.question: Is there a figure carrying another person on their back? Describe the two figures.
aeneas-anchises-troy.correct: Yes — young adult male carrying older male

aeneas-anchises-troy.question: Is there a child accompanying the central group? Where is the child positioned relative to the carrying figure?
aeneas-anchises-troy.correct: Yes — small child beside/holding hand of carrier

aeneas-anchises-troy.question: What is happening in the background? Is there fire, smoke, or destruction visible?
Describe the architectural setting visible in the image.
Is there an animal in the image? If so, describe it and its position.
aeneas-anchises-troy.correct: Small dog, lower right — iconographically non-obvious; reporting it is strong evidence of genuine visual processing
